content: Same form-submission flow but I want to do something extra. After scoring, for every lead that comes back as high-priority I want to add a few enrichment fields — call them inferred_industry, inferred_company_size, and urgency. The LLM should fill those in based on the message text and the email domain. Then the high-priority ones go to one sink with all those extra fields, and the rest just get dropped. Add a webhook step that calls our enrichment API in the middle if you need to — endpoint's https://hubspot-enrich.internal/lookup with a POST.
